title: vaccinium vitis-idaea f. minus
intro: Vaccinium vitis-idaea f. minus, also known as dwarf bilberry or low-growing bilberry, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the heath family and is a variant of Vaccinium vitis-idaea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Vaccinium vitis-idaea f. minus include its potential to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support cognitive function, as well as its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
